title: Monday morning Drop-in

content:
Hate Mondays? We have the cure. Start your week off with fun and exercise!

The Edmonton Squash Club will be hosting drop-in squash on Monday mornings from 9:45 am until 12:00 pm starting October 16th. These drop-ins will appeal to members and non-members who have flexibility in their day and are looking to play and connect with a group of players outside of peak hours.

If you know of non-members who are avid squash players, have flexible schedules and are looking for daytime matches, encourage them to contact the club for information on non-member rates.
